calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-15-2012 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Motion For Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-30-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Sam Wu, Esq. Appearing for Plaintiff Chris Zhou, dba Chestnut Street Cleaners.
Plaintiff Chris Zhou sworn and examined.
Cantonese Interpreted Sherry Liu present in court.

No appearance by defaulted defendant Young Lee, dba Nina's Dry Cleaners.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants as follows:

Damages $14,999.06
Prejudgment interest at the annual rate of 10 % $3,499.78
Costs $330.00 for a total judgment in the amount of $18,828.84
Judgment signed.

Ntc Of Motion For Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-23-2012 Continued To Oct-30-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: Sam Wu, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Chris Zhou. No appearace for Defaulted Defendant Young Lee, individual and dba, Nina's Dry Cleaners.
Court ordered Default Prove Up hearing continued to October 30, 2012 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514. Proceedings reported by: Sonia Wong, CSR#11288. (514)
